serverNeeds.description: Map image width/height onto GET /api/webflow/assets/:siteId rows so cards can show w×h (kit proposal #2). Add to WebflowAsset + client Asset types.
serverNeeds.evidence: WebflowAsset (server/webflow-assets.ts:19-31) and client Asset (src/hooks/admin/useAdminAssets.ts:7-17) have no width/height; grep 'width|height' in server/webflow.ts and webflow-assets.ts list path is empty.

serverNeeds.description: 'Graduation' insight write when a compression pass measurably moves CWV (kit proposal #4): new InsightType + typed data + Zod schema + renderer per the 4-part registration rule, triggered from the bulk-compress job or a Performance/CWV bridge. Blocked on OQ5 (which system owns measurement).
serverNeeds.evidence: grep 'compress' across shared/types/analytics.ts + server/intelligence/*.ts returns nothing; no insight/outcome reference in server/webflow-bulk-compress-background-job.ts or webflow-alt-text.ts.
serverNeeds.whereItLives: shared/types/analytics.ts + server/schemas/ + an insight bridge (server/intelligence/ or outcome-tracking per OQ5)

serverNeeds.description: OPTIONAL full-version only: server-computed potential-savings estimate (sharp dry-run) replacing the client 55% heuristic. Quick-win path is client-side from the already-fetched asset list, so this ships only if the heuristic is rejected.
serverNeeds.evidence: No savings-estimate endpoint: grep 'savings' in server/routes/webflow*.ts empty; compression savings only computed post-hoc per asset in webflow-alt-text.ts:274-325.

openQuestions.question: OQ1: Where does Audit mode (scan, health score, 8 issue classes, CSV, lightbox) live in the new Asset Manager?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Option (a)/(b) hybrid: Audit as a lens inside Asset Manager with score header (Meter) + issue-class FilterChips; keep all 8 classes.

openQuestions.question: OQ2: Upload pipeline home — mode of Asset Manager, global affordance, or own surface? Prototype's direct-upload stub is a behavior change.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: T1 carry-over-then-reskin: keep Upload as a lens with both drop zones + queue + ⌘V hint; no behavior change.

openQuestions.question: OQ3: Organize into Folders — keep (where?) or deliberately retire?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Keep as a Toolbar action on Browse opening the preview in a Drawer; retirement needs explicit sign-off.

openQuestions.question: OQ4: CMS field selector — launch requirement or deferrable? Deferring while keeping CMS-aware compression risks clobbering intentionally-sized OG images.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Ship the full selector at launch (it is a safety gate, not polish); if cut, defer CMS-aware compression with it.

openQuestions.question: OQ5: 'Graduation' → Insights Engine — define trigger + data contract; which system owns the CWV-delta measurement (Performance, insight bridges, outcome tracking)?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Defer to a C3-style follow-up (sn-asset-manager-2); not a rebuild-parity item.

openQuestions.question: OQ6: Confirm single delete, bulk delete, and Delete-All-Unused all return, and window.confirm → ConfirmDialog?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Yes to all three; migrate to ConfirmDialog.

openQuestions.question: OQ7: How should the AI-quota 429 render (disabled buttons + tooltip? banner?) — required by four-states rule, undefined in prototype.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Disabled AI actions with quota tooltip + dismissible banner on first 429; bulk stream shows partial-run tally.

openQuestions.question: NEW: Does the Webflow v2 list-assets API response actually include dimensions, or does sn-asset-manager-1 need per-asset fetches/image probing?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Verify one live API response before committing sn-asset-manager-1; if absent from the list payload, omit dimensions initially (doc's quick-win) rather than N+1 fetching.

kitNewFeatures.proposal: Total media weight + potential savings (~55% heuristic) stat cards
kitNewFeatures.rationale: Computable client-side from the existing asset list (sum sizes); label savings as an estimate to satisfy the no-fabricated-numbers floor. Full sharp dry-run = sn-asset-manager-3, deferred.
Additive data ticket sn-asset-manager-1; omit gracefully until the field lands (see newly-found OQ on API availability).

kitNewFeatures.proposal: Site Audit → Asset Manager deep-link with pre-set filter
kitNewFeatures.rationale: Pure frontend two-halves contract (?filter=/?tab= receiver + contract test); no server work.

kitNewFeatures.proposal: 'Graduation' note → Insights Engine on CWV improvement
kitNewFeatures.rationale: New cross-system functionality (sn-asset-manager-2) blocked on OQ5 ownership; not rebuild parity.
Fine iff every row affordance (manual alt edit, rename draft, CMS badges, open-in-new-tab, delete) gets a card/drawer home.
Admin-only surface — consistent with Four Laws law 4.

composition.mountNote: Admin Page 'media' inside F4 RebuiltAppChrome behind ui-rebuild-shell; add ?tab= + ?filter= deep-link receiver (none exists at HEAD — grep useSearchParams in MediaTab/AssetBrowser/AssetAudit is empty) with contract test.

crossSurfaceDeps: site-audit surface — sender half of the AssetsView.open(filter) deep-link (and OQ1 option c would relocate audit-y classes there)
performance surface — Page Weight → Asset Manager compression hand-off (Performance.tsx:32) needs the same deep-link receiver
background-job platform + NotificationBell — bulk-compress job and any future bulk-alt migration (docs/rules/background-generation.md)
unknowns: Whether the Webflow v2 list-assets API payload includes width/height (the untyped passthrough in listAssets means it may already arrive but be dropped by typing) — not verifiable from repo; gates sn-asset-manager-1 effort.
Final audit-mode home (OQ1) changes lens count and whether Meter/score ships — composition above assumes 3 lenses pending sign-off.

verdicts.evidence: server/webflow-assets.ts:18-31 (WebflowAsset interface) has no width/height/dimension fields; src/hooks/admin/useAdminAssets.ts:6-17 (client Asset interface) likewise lacks them; rg -i 'width|height|dimension' across server/webflow-assets.ts, server/webflow.ts, server/routes/webflow*.ts returns zero hits, and none in shared/types/cms-images.ts. GET /api/webflow/assets/:siteId (server/routes/webflow.ts:60-68) is a straight passthrough of listAssets() output — no dimension mapping exists. Effort 'S' is correct: this is an in-memory Webflow-API passthrough shape, NOT a DB column, so the DB-column+mapper+serialization lockstep rule does not apply (no migration). NOTE for the fan-out: whether it stays trivially S depends on OQ — if Webflow's /assets response already carries dimensions it is mapping-only; if not, the field must be populated by image introspection (extra fetch/sharp), which is still endpoint-shape work but larger. The claim's 'no' + 'S' both stand.

InsightType union (shared/types/analytics.ts:190-211) contains no 'graduation', compression, or CWV-move insight type; rg -i 'graduat' across shared/types/ and server/ returns only unrelated fuzzy matches ('ne'-truncated words in outcome-tracking.ts/roi.ts, none an insight). rg -i 'compress' across shared/types/analytics.ts and server/intelligence/ returns nothing. server/webflow-bulk-compress-background-job.ts (123 lines) contains no insight/outcome/recordAction/CWV reference — it does not write any insight. The 4-part registration path the claim names is real (InsightType union line 190, InsightDataMap line 558, plus Zod schema + renderer). Effort 'M' and the OQ5 measurement-ownership blocker are accurate. Claim stands as written.

The 'exists=no' verdict is CORRECT — no potential-savings / dry-run estimate endpoint exists: rg -i 'savings|potential|estimate|dry.?run|heuristic' across server/routes/webflow-audit.ts, webflow-alt-text.ts, webflow-pagespeed.ts returns nothing. BUT the cited evidence 'compression savings only computed post-hoc per asset in webflow-alt-text.ts:274-325' is wrong on two counts: (1) lines 274-325 of server/routes/webflow-alt-text.ts are the bulk-alt error handler + the POST /api/webflow/:workspaceId/compress/:assetId endpoint body — not a savings computation; the actual byte comparison happens inside compressImageBuffer/replaceCompressedAsset (server/webflow-alt-text.ts service module, a different file from the route module server/routes/webflow-alt-text.ts). (2) The gatherer conflated the route file and the service file of the same name. The conclusion (no server savings-estimate endpoint; quick-win is client-side; effort M for the optional sharp dry-run path) is sound — only the file:line citation needs correcting to point at the compressImageBuffer result shape in the webflow-alt-text SERVICE module rather than route lines 274-325.
